title: Capacitive MEMS microphone, microphone unit and electronic device
abstract: Disclosed in embodiments of the present disclosure are a capacitive MEMS microphone, a microphone unit and an electronic device. The capacitive MEMS microphone includes: a back electrode plate; a diaphragm; and a spacer for separating the back electrode plate from the diaphragm, wherein in a state where no operating bias is applied, at least a portion of the diaphragm is pre-deviated in a direction away from the back electrode plate relative to a flat position.
claims: 1. A capacitive MEMS microphone, comprising: a back electrode plate; a diaphragm; and a spacer separating the back electrode plate from the diaphragm, wherein in a state where no operating bias is applied, at least a portion of the diaphragm is pre-deviated in a direction away from the back electrode plate relative to a flat position, and wherein a ratio of a first static effective displacement of the at least a portion of the diaphragm that is pre-deviated to a thickness of the diaphragm is greater than or equal to 0.2 and less than or equal to 3.
